label: 72_range federal_target range_funds rate_federal funds
description: The Federal Reserve considered adjusting the federal funds rate target range cautiously in light of weak domestic spending data. Some members also warned about potential risks from elevated asset valuations and accommodative financial conditions, while inflation expectations remained stable.
